channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 12: Kalyan Jewellers, Adani Power, Anant Raj, Tata Motors, BEML, UPL among top losers
item.description: On May 12, the Indian stock market experienced significant declines as the Nifty 50 fell 1.83% and the Sensex dropped 2%. Investors reacted to fears of an oil shock and ongoing Iran negotiations, leading to bearish trends across all major sectors and rising crude prices.

item.title: NEET-UG 2026 cancelled LIVE: CBI to probe paper leak allegations
item.description: The NEET-UG examination for students seeking admission to undergraduate courses in medical colleges will now be held again on dates to be notified separately

item.title: JPMorgan India expects 30% corporate banking growth, says CEO Pranav Chawda- Moneycontrol.com - LinkedIn
item.description: JPMorgan India expects 30% corporate banking growth, says CEO Pranav Chawda- Moneycontrol.com LinkedIn

item.title: Quiet Token Sales Boosted Trump Crypto Wealth by $660 Million
item.description: Trump family members made roughly $1.55 billion from sales of World Liberty Financial Inc. tokens, lifting their total fortune by about $660 million, after accounting for previously undisclosed transactions, according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index.

item.title: Tamil Nadu politics LIVE: AIADMK reacts sharply to rebel MLAs, AMMK expels party's lone legislator
item.description: Ahead of crucial floor test, split wide open in AIADMK

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari aide murder case: Accused's counsel hails CBI probe; mother says son framed
item.description: Advocate Harivansh Singh also accused the West Bengal Police of failing to adhere to legal procedure during the arrest of his client, Raj Singh

item.title: Who really owns the AI boom? South Korea’s Presidential Policy Office is proposing a 'National Dividend', or a plan to redirect windfall profits from AI & semiconductors into youth startups, rural basic income, & pensions. However, critics warn that taxing 'excess - LinkedIn
item.description: Who really owns the AI boom? South Korea’s Presidential Policy Office is proposing a 'National Dividend', or a plan to redirect windfall profits from AI & semiconductors into youth startups, rural basic income, & pensions. However, critics warn that taxing 'excess LinkedIn

item.title: United Arab Emirates Collaborates With Iran, China, Russia, India, South Africa, Brazil, And BRICS Nations In Urgent Efforts To Rebuild Middle East Stability And Reinforce Travel Routes Through Ceasefire Initiatives And Economic Partnerships - Travel And Tour World
item.description: United Arab Emirates Collaborates With Iran, China, Russia, India, South Africa, Brazil, And BRICS Nations In Urgent Efforts To Rebuild Middle East Stability And Reinforce Travel Routes Through Ceasefire Initiatives And Economic Partnerships Travel And Tour World

item.title: NEET 2026 re-examination is unfair on students, say educationalists in coastal Karnataka
item.description: Expert Group of Institutions Chairman Narendra Nayak demanded severe punishment not just to those who leaked the questions, but also those who enabled the leak

item.title: Hyderabad is third most accident-prone city in India, Telangana logs nearly 8,000 road deaths in 2024: NCRB
item.description: Hyderabad recorded a 28.6% rise in number accidents in 2024, behind only Delhi and Bengaluru.

item.title: Prikus Secures USD 2.5 Million Funding to Accelerate AI-Driven Cybersecurity Expansion - The Tribune
item.description: Prikus Secures USD 2.5 Million Funding to Accelerate AI-Driven Cybersecurity Expansion The Tribune

item.title: Congress claims Instagram blocked Rahul Gandhi's reel and photo post featuring Vijay due to MeitY rules
item.description: Sources in the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology clarified that it had nothing to do with the action and it was because the platform’s internal system mistakenly flagged the post for blocking

item.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly: from TVK Minister Keerthana not bringing election certificate to AIADMK MLA becoming emotional
item.description: With both formats of affirmation — swearing in the name of God as well as affirming by conscience — printed on the oath sheet, many members read out the entire text verbatim instead of choosing one.

item.title: Bond Market Ditches Warsh Trade as Oil Surges
item.description: The bond market thought it had the Kevin Warsh trade figured out. Events changed that.

item.description: Marco Rubio Aims to Reset U.S.-India Ties in New Delhi Foreign Policy

item.title: Rubio Aims to Reset U.S.-India Ties
item.description: The secretary of state may face an uphill battle during his visit to New Delhi this month.

item.title: What's at stake for trade, Taiwan and Iran in Trump's high-risk summit with China's Xi
item.description: China experts expect Trump and Xi may announce trade deals or other agreements, such as a Chinese purchase of U.S. agricultural products or Boeing aircraft.

item.title: Senate Republicans warn Trump against Cuba military attack - The Hill
item.description: Senate Republicans warn Trump against Cuba military attack The Hill

item.title: Semiconductor Startup HrdWyr Raises $13 Mn To Build AI-Native Chips
item.description: Bengaluru-based semiconductor startup HrdWyr has raised $13 Mn (about ₹124 Cr) in its Series A funding round led by Ideaspring…

item.title: NEET UG 2026 Live: ‘Mastermind’ Arrested In Jaipur As Leak Probe Deepens
item.description: NEET UG Exam 2026 LIVE Updates: Paper Cancelled, What's Next For Students?

item.title: Conditions favourable for onset of southwest monsoon over South Bay of Bengal, Andaman: IMD
item.description: The southwest monsoon is set to arrive over the Bay of Bengal and Andaman Islands by the week's end. This marks a timely start to India's crucial rainfall season. However, the India Meteorological Department forecasts below-average rainfall for the country. The monsoon's arrival is vital for agriculture, impacting crops like paddy, pulses and oilseeds.

item.title: Gujarat Expands Renewable Energy and Battery Storage Framework as India Accelerates Grid Modernization - Africa Sustainability Matters
item.description: Gujarat Expands Renewable Energy and Battery Storage Framework as India Accelerates Grid Modernization Africa Sustainability Matters

item.title: Korea Benchmark Bond Yield Tops 4% as Rate-Hike Bets Grow
item.description: South Korea’s 10-year bond yield rose above 4% for the first time since late 2023, as an oil shock tied to the Iran conflict leads traders to expect bigger interest rate hikes.

item.title: Tele Columbus Creditors Unite Ahead of Potential Debt Talks
item.description: Creditors to Tele Columbus AG are banding together as the struggling German internet service provider controlled by Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners braces for debt talks.

item.title: Kremlin: Ukraine can end the war at any moment - Breakingthenews.net
item.description: Kremlin: Ukraine can end the war at any moment Breakingthenews.net

item.title: Emerging-Market Currencies, Stocks Fall as Iran Peace Hopes Dim
item.description: Emerging-market currencies and stocks fell on concern the ceasefire between the US and Iran is on the brink of collapse, while a slump in South Korean shares also weighed on sentiment.

item.title: Will AI trade reversal in Taiwan, South Korea benefit India stock markets in future? - MSN
item.description: Will AI trade reversal in Taiwan, South Korea benefit India stock markets in future? MSN

item.title: Unique Picks: 6 stocks held by only one MF scheme in April, falling up to 40% in CY26
item.description: An analysis of mutual fund portfolios revealed 29 stocks held exclusively by single schemes, with most underperforming in CY26. However, Satin Creditcare Network, Rossell Techsys, and Amanta Healthcare bucked the trend, delivering strong returns. Brooks Laboratories and EFC (I) were among those experiencing significant declines.

item.title: Israeli military kills six in Lebanon, issues more displacement threats
item.description: The deadly air attack comes just days before Israeli and Lebanese officials are due to meet in Washington.

item.title: Tehran's 'Weapon-Grade Uranium Enrishment' Warning If US Attacks Iran Again
item.description: Uranium's enrichment becomes increasingly easy as concentrations rise.

item.title: 9 Killed As Bomb Rigged To Rickshaw Explodes In Pakistan's Khyber Pakhtunkhwa
item.description: No group immediately claimed responsibility for the bombing

item.title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
item.description: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.

item.title: “Time expired”: Hackers leak Vodafone source code after company refuses to pay - Cybernews
item.description: “Time expired”: Hackers leak Vodafone source code after company refuses to pay Cybernews

item.title: Dolphin Drilling Boosts Backlog with Harbour Energy Deal, Oil India Extension - Offshore Engineer Magazine
item.description: Dolphin Drilling Boosts Backlog with Harbour Energy Deal, Oil India Extension Offshore Engineer Magazine

item.title: Multibagger small-cap stock Dynamic Cables plunges 20% after Q4 results
item.description: Dynamic Cables stock fell 20% on May 12 after a modest Q4 performance, reporting a 3% YoY net profit growth. Despite challenges, the company recorded a 17% revenue increase for FY26 and a strong order book of ₹808 crore, highlighting operational resilience.

item.title: "Business For Particular Gangs": Ashok Gehlot After NEET Exam Cancelled
item.description: There needs to be a thorough investigation into NEET paper leak, Ashok Gehlot said

item.title: India needs to cut reliance on foreign funds: Uday Kotak says ‘strongly urge companies to not be…’
item.description: Uday Kotak urged companies to focus on long-term growth and reinvest profits, while also enhancing the domestic private equity and venture capital landscape.

item.title: Petroleum Minister does not rule out fuel price hike amidst concerns about mounting OMCs’ losses
item.description: Speaking at the CII Annual Business Summit 2026, Petroleum Minister Hardeep Puri said India has 60 days of crude oil and LNG stock, and 45 days of rolling stock of LPG

item.title: Instructure reaches 'agreement' with ShinyHunters to stop data leak
item.description: Instructure, the edtech giant behind the widely popular Canvas learning management system (LMS), has reached an "agreement" with the ShinyHunters extortion group to prevent the data stolen in a recent breach from being leaked online. [...]
